title: 03 the car opens like part of the set
prompt: Use case: compositing. Asset type: cinematic storyboard action frame. Image 1 controls Tina's identity, wardrobe, product, miniature tropical set, suspended gummy fish, turquoise-coral-pink palette, and warm key plus cyan fill lighting. Image 2 supplies only the wider exterior idea of a car opening around seated Tina; reject its orange candy interior, rainbow parachute, empty sky, and exaggerated expression. Show a passenger-side medium wide shot on the miniature music-video stage. The blue-gray roof and passenger-side outer shell peel backward in two broad smooth panels, like removable scenic flats with a thin pearly pink underside. The black rear seat, floor, wheels, and structural frame remain intact. Tina stays seated holding the gummy and bag. Five gummy fish are suspended around the opening on fine thread. Keep the set small, frontal, graphic, and simple.

resolved_params.system_prompt: Create one frame from a coherent live-action Peelerz music-video commercial. Preserve Tina as the same young woman with long brown hair, blue jacket, black top, pink lychee gummy, and pink Peelerz package. The visual idea is deliberately simple: Tina remains photographic while the world outside becomes a small handbuilt tabletop set. Favor restrained production design, bold controlled light, tactile practical effects, visible fine suspension thread, and charming artificiality. No elaborate fantasy lore, giant creatures, underwater ocean, CGI spectacle, crowded candyland, captions, borders, or watermarks.
